name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Changed

- UniBridge_WorkSession now captures an optional compact loaded-scene semantic baseline at Begin and includes semantic review data in Status/Review and active WorkSession auto-review blocks.
- Semantic review reports created/deleted/moved/renamed GameObjects, component changes, renderer sorting changes, prefab-info changes, transform changes, and missing-script deltas by stable object id.

### Previous Changes

- UniBridge_BatchActions appends active UniBridge_WorkSession review data after executing batches by default, so agents immediately see changed-file counts, risks, and sample paths when a WorkSession is active.
- UniBridge_ExecutionStatus Snapshot/Recent includes an active WorkSession review summary by default.
- Bundled relay 1.1.0-build.15 recovers RefreshAssets connection loss caused by Unity import/domain reload.
